creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
itetcu      2006-09-14 08:51:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    archivers            Makefile 
  Added files:
    archivers/kio_p7zip  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    archivers/kio_p7zip/files patch-src__kfile_7zip.desktop 
                              patch-src__x-7z.desktop 
  Log:
  This is a kioslave for KDE to handle 7zip files.
  Simply, enter 'p7zip:/path_to_file/filename.7z' in konqueror to use this.
  
  Author: Raul Fernandes <rgfbr@yahoo.com.br>
  WWW:    http://www.kde-apps.org/content/show.php?content=17829
  
  PR:             ports/101009
  Submitted by:   makc <makc at issp.ac.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.156     +1 -0      ports/archivers/Makefile
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/archivers/kio_p7zip/Makefile (new)

  1.1       +14 -0     ports/archivers/kio_p7zip/files/patch-src__x-7z.desktop (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/archivers/kio_p7zip/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/archivers/kio_p7zip/pkg-plist (new)
